zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏多趋势
zh.content:
目前以太坊价格稳定在1634.56美元附近，较24小时波动0.26%，显示市场整体呈现温和上涨态势。结合SMA(20)位于1611.31美元之下，可视为短期支撑强劲，价格仍处于均线之上，短线多头仍占优。

技术指标方面，MACD当前值为12.22550，虽然信号线未提供，但MACD为正数意味着上行动能仍存在。若未来MACD与信号线形成金叉，将进一步确认多头趋势。然而RSI数据缺失，需关注超买或超卖风险，以防回调出现。

支撑位主要在1610-1615美元区间，若跌破该水平可能触发短期调整；阻力位则在1635-1640美元，突破后有望测试1650美元附近。市场成交量若同步放大，将增强突破可靠性。

交易策略上，可考虑短线逢低买入，目标看向阻力位1640美元，止损设置在1610美元下方。若价格连续收于阻力位之上，可适度加仓。保持关注行情波动和技术指标变化，谨防单边行情快速反转。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is maintaining a constructive short-term bullish structure, trading at 1634.56 and holding above the 20-period SMA at 1611.31. The price remains near the session high of 1635.02, suggesting buyers continue to control momentum despite relatively modest 24-hour gains of 0.26%. The ability to stay above the moving average indicates underlying strength, while the narrow trading range reflects a period of consolidation rather than aggressive directional expansion.

The available technical indicators lean positive. The SMA(20) remains well below the current market price, confirming an upward bias in the prevailing trend. MACD at 12.2255 is in positive territory, which generally signals bullish momentum and continued buying pressure. Although the signal line and RSI values are unavailable, the combination of positive MACD readings and sustained trading above key moving-average support suggests that momentum remains favorable unless price begins to break below recent support levels.

From a price-structure perspective, immediate support is located around 1630, corresponding to the session low and recent intraday demand zone. A secondary support area can be identified near the SMA(20) around 1611. Stronger downside protection may emerge in the 1600 region if selling pressure increases. On the upside, resistance is forming near 1635, the current session high. A decisive break above this level could open the path toward the 1650-1665 area, where traders may encounter increased profit-taking activity.

For traders, the current setup favors a cautiously bullish approach while price remains above 1630 and particularly above the 1611 SMA. Momentum traders may look for confirmation through a breakout above 1635 before initiating new long positions, targeting higher resistance zones. More conservative participants may prefer waiting for pullbacks toward support levels to improve risk-reward characteristics. A sustained move below 1630 would weaken the near-term outlook and increase the probability of a retracement toward the 1610-1600 support cluster.
